prevalence.source: Endocrine Society of India context and epidemiology syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; morbidity from hyperthyroidism and ophthalmopathy

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Suppressed TSH with elevated free T4/T3; positive TRAb; thyroid uptake scan when needed

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Lab testing widely available; uptake scan mainly in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Antithyroid drugs, beta-blockers, radioiodine or surgery when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Delayed diagnosis in rural areas and limited ophthalmology care for orbitopathy
